channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Sofa dumped behind a garage, 7th March
item.description:
This sofa along with other detritus has been here for some time, dumped behind some garages off Collyer Close. I assume this is on private land but right next door to a piece of wild no man’s land which I assume belongs to the council and which also needs clearing of detritus. Am hoping that if council sends a team to clean up the council land they could pick up the sofa at the same time - otherwise it will just stay there for decades.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Colyer Close, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Potholes, 7th March
item.description:
Please repair

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Belmont Lane, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned vehicles, 7th March
item.description:
5 x abandoned vehicles on the road- flat tyres, waterlogged, preventing residents parking

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Astbury Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Filthy mattress & household items dumped, 7th March
item.description:
The usual almost weekly dump :-(

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Long Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Furniture dumped, 7th March
item.description:
Sofa, mattress and other furniture items dumped in the pathway for pedestrians making it unsafe to pass by.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 198-200, Northumberland Park, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog poo on 1 Glebe Road, 7th March
item.description:
Another day another dog poo on 1 Glebe Road. My last report was 4 days ago

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Middleton Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Illegally parked hire bikes on the footpath, 7th March
item.description:
Illegally parked hire bikes on the footpath - all companies responsible for 50+ bikes left on footpath under railway bridge. pedestrians are then forced to walk on the cycle path and road making this area an accident black spot and the council doing nothing to protect pedestrians. keep taking the fees and extend the operating licence - so proud of you
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Greet Street, Waterloo, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Canisters of laughing gas in front of Curtis St Garages, 7th March
item.description:
Canisters of laughing gas and other rubbish littered in front of Curtis St Garagea where cars park irregularly. Please clear ASAP as this encourages more of this antisocial behaviour

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 61, Willow Walk, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping on pavement, 7th March
item.description:
Outside 230 Bellegrove Rd Bags and rugs on one pavement. Sofa on another. Maybe speak to Robinson and Jackson and Acorn as letting agents?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 7th March
item.description:
Lot of Graffiti on wall on the bridge walk way between Eltham park South and Eltham park North.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Riefield Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Double mattress dumped on pavement, 7th March
item.description:
Large, double mattress dumped on pavement. Has been placed against wall to allow pedestrians to use pavement and not walk in road. Opposite 100 Northdown Road, Welling. Local RING cameras may have caught fly tipping ?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Northdown Road, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A rubbish is dumped outside for over a week now, 7th March
item.description:
This is hazards and destroying the street view

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 8, Longbury Drive, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree growing into metal, 7th March
item.description:
Cage needs removing or tree trimming

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): South Hill Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattresses and bed frame dumped, 7th March
item.description:
Mattresses have been dumped outside our house and a bed frame in goose green. Reported and reported closed but items still there.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 106, East Dulwich Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish sacks left outside unit 5 and 4, 7th March
item.description:
Rubbish sacks left outside property and now more rubbish is being added to the pile.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bentley Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin full, 7th March
item.description:
Please empty. Thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Daly Drive, Bickley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Building waste dumped, 7th March
item.description:
Building waste dumped outside houses.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lucknow Street, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Parked vehicles causing obstruction, 7th March
item.description:
Parked vehicles on Deepdene Road are constantly causing problems accessing roads. People parking on yellow lines to get fast food from high street having no consideration for residents who need to access roads.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Deepdene Road, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog fouling everywhere on roads around school, 7th March
item.description:
This has already been reported several times in the past, but yet again the on going issue with the amount of dog mess along Lancelot road, outside Danson primary school gates on Dansington road and the small alleyways off Lancelot road is an absolute disgrace. Every morning children are crying as they have walked through it or scootered in it. Even if it is picked up the bags are then just thrown along the road. It’s becoming a health issue with that many children using these roads and alleyways on their way to and from school.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lancelot Road, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Weeding needed at 145 Great Suffolk St (still not resolved), 7th March
item.description:
Despite the notice saying this had been ‘resolved’, there does not seem to have been any weeding or maintenance of this area. The base of this tree is badly in need of weeding.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 280, Borough High Street, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
